title: Genshin Impact Hu Tao GUI
description: Hu Tao-themed Minecraft UI pack with elegant visuals inspired by Genshin Impact.
body:
# 🌸 Hu Tao GUI Pack 🌸  

Transform your Minecraft experience with a complete **GUI overhaul** inspired by Hu Tao from Genshin Impact!  
Every interface has been redesigned with a stylish red background and elegant details to match Hu Tao’s theme.  

# ✨ Features:  
Fully reworked:
-  inventory  
- Crafting table & furnace screens  
- Villager trading interface  
- Chests, menus, and more!  

🎨 Resolution: 256x256  
💜 **Perfect for Genshin Impact fans** who want their Minecraft to feel unique and aesthetic!
